description: Corinth Brick 4/3/3 on nearly 1.5 acres! Main house is a 3/2 approx 2294 sqft. There is a mother in law suite that is part of the original construction of the house that is about 268 sqft. The seller converted 2 garage spaces to make the MIL suite ~800 sqft and added a kitchenette to make it fully functional as a living space. 2 out buildings (recently spent $30k on)  one is ~25x18ft on slab foundation with a carport. the other is ~ 20x20 with a crushed granite floor. Property is hard to comp. Neighbor across the street sold recently for $980k. Its not a direct comp but still a data point. Both adjacent neighbors are listed for sale. One is essentially a tear down for $375k and the other just went live on the market for 1.3+Mil... Property is on a shared well and has a septic system. Contact Ariel for further questions. (817)-565-9399
